title: Thunder Craft
description: Perfect 1.20 Modpack for every type of player
body:
### Thunder Craft!

**Everything you want from a modpack in ONE PLACE**

- 🏰 Structures
- 🌴 Biomes
- 🦎 Mobs
- 📶 FPS Optimization
- 🌒 Dimensions

![a screenshot from the end presenting the cool adventure vibe from the pack](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/970407966857646142/1175590589077651508/2023-11-18_13.05.42.png?ex=656bc90d&is=6559540d&hm=e72ad891b76dc509ce31d53fc15ae7b6670b673059ceb4fea680b36d0cc228a5&)

---

**Thunder Craft brings minecraft 1.20 to the next level with over 150 mods!**
 Containing mods such as Ad Astra!, Deeper and Darker, Galosphere or AdventureZ!
 Getting bored of your minecraft world was **NEVER HARDER** 
Pack is perfect for a casual Singleplayer Hardcore World or making an SMP with a bunch of friends! 


---
